card.name: Spear and Fang
card.text: Activated abilities of artifacts your opponents control can't be activated. Whenever a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, you may draw a card.

card.name: Mio, the Eye's Keeper
card.text: Flying Whenever you tap a nonland permanent for mana, add {C}.

card.name: Zombie Spear
card.text: Zombie Spear can't block. Dash—{B}, Discard a card. (You may cast this spell for its dash cost. If you do, it gains haste, and it's returned from the battlefield to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.) You may cast this card from your graveyard using its dash ability.

card.name: Khazan, First Berserker
card.text: Trample, haste When Khazan enters, you may discard up to two cards. If you do, draw that many cards. If you would draw a card while you have one or fewer cards in hand, you may instead exile the top two cards of your library. If you do, you may play those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Reese, Bride of Despair
card.text: Flying, lifelink Exhaust — {1}{B}, Pay X life: Draw X cards. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.) Warp {1}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Crisanta of Wrapped Agony
card.text: Flying, lifelink When Crisanta enters, you may search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. You lose life equal to that card's mana value. Other equipped creatures you control have flying and lifelink.

card.name: Penitent One
card.text: When this creature enters, create a colorless Equipment artifact token named Sword with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and equip {2}. Other creatures you control get +1/+1 for each Equipment attached to this creature.

card.name: Sierpes, the Traitor
card.text: Ravenous (This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.) Vigilance Escape—{3}{W}{W}, Exile X cards from your gaveyard. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)

card.name: Come Back
card.text: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Carol Sturka
card.text: Survival — At the beginning of your second main phase, if Carol Sturka is tapped, create a Junk token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Manousos Oviedo
card.text: Survival — At the beginning of your second main phase, if Manousos Oviedo is tapped, return up to one target nonland permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Sargon, Prince of Persia
card.text: Flash Whenever you cast a spell during an opponent's turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Sargon. {1}{U}, {T}: Untap up to three lands you control. End the turn. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Darius, King of Kings
card.text: Ward {2} Whenever Darius enters or attacks, return up to one target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If it's an Equipment, you may attach it to Darius.

card.name: Grovekeeper Topoda
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Boast — {1}{G}: Double Grovekeeper Topoda's power until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Cold Harbor
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each different mana value among nonland permanents you control. Return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Severance Procedure
card.text: Destroy target creature. It's controller creates two tokens that are copies of it, except the tokens are 1/1 and aren't legendary.

card.name: ORTBO
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Counter target spell. Its controller creates a Clue token. If this spell was kicked, you create that token instead. (A Clue is an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Avatar Korra
card.text: Whenever Avatar Korra attacks, you may waterbend {3}. When you do, choose one — • Add {R}{G}{W}{U}. Until end of combat, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. • Exile another target permanent, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. • Double the number of counters on target permanent you control.

card.name: Shiro, Black Paladin
card.text: Menace Valiant — Whenever Shiro becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on him. When you do, return up to one target creature card with mana value less than or equal to Shiro's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Keith, Red Paladin
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Keith becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. If you discarded a nonland card this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Keith. Whenever you discard a land card, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until your next end step.

card.name: Lance, Blue Paladin
card.text: Valiant — Whenever Lance becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, untap him. {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card. {1}{U}, {T}: Tap another target creature. Put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Pidge, Green Paladin
card.text: When Pidge enters, create a 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature token. {G}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn has improvise. (Your artifacts can help cast that spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.)

card.name: Hunk, Yellow Paladin
card.text: When Hunk enters or attacks, create a tapped Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Artifacts you control have "{T}: Add {W}. You can't spend this mana to cast nonartifact spells."

card.name: The Black Bayard
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Whenever equipped creature attacks, add one mana of any color. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. Equip {0}. Activate only once each turn. ({0}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Voltron, Legendary Defender
card.text: Whenever Voltron enters or attacks, discover 5. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 5 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.) Whenever Voltron attacks, if it was crewed by exactly five legendary creatures this turn, you win the game. Crew 5

card.name: Allura, Altean Princess
card.text: Whenever you cast an artifact or enchantment spell, draw a card. At the beginning of combat on your turn, up to one target artifact or non-Aura enchantment you control becomes a 3/3 creature in addition to its other types until end of turn.

card.name: Galran Sentry
card.text: When this creature dies, draw a card. You may put an artifact or creature card with mana value 2 or less from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Make a Good Team
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, put X +1/+1 counters on target creature you control, where X is the number of cards you've drawn this turn or the number of cards you've discarded this turn, whichever is greater.

card.name: Paladin's Persistence
card.text: Escalate {2} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Target creature gets +3/-3 until end of turn. • Put target creature card with mana value 3 or less from a graveyard onto the battlefield tapped under your control. • Target opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.name: Paladin's Fervor
card.text: Escalate—{1}, Discard a card. (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Paladin's Fervor deals 3 damage to any target. • Add {R} for each 1 life your opponents have lost this turn. • Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Paladin's Adaptability
card.text: Escalate {2} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. • Look at the top X cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. • Tap or untap up to X target permanents.

card.name: Paladin's Ingenuity
card.text: Escalate—{1}, Tap an untapped artifact you control. (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • Create two 1/1 colorless Servo artifact creature tokens. • Exile each opponent's graveyard. You gain 1 life for each card exiled this way. • Each opponent sacrifices an artifact and an enchantment.

card.name: Paladin's Devotion
card.text: Escalate {2} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.) Choose one or more — • All creatures you control phase out. • Until your next turn, you gain protection from everything and your life total can't change. • You may put a creature card with mana value 3 or less from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Honerva, Altean Witch
card.text: During your turn, you may cast black spells and artifact spells from your graveyard. If a card would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. Warp {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Asami Sato, Industrialist
card.text: Whenever Asami Sato attacks, look at the top six cards of your library. Then you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, you may put an artifact card from among those cards onto the battlefield. That artifact deals damage to you equal to its mana value. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Korra Alone
card.text: Return all cards from your graveyard to your hand. Until end of turn, your maximum hand size is zero. You may play two additional lands this turn. Exile Korra Alone.

card.name: Kuvira's Colossus
card.text: When Kuvira's Colossus enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls. Whenever one or more cards are put into exile from graveyards and/or the battlefield, each opponent loses 2 life. Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Lady Butterfly
card.text: Whenever Lady Butterfly attacks, she deals 2 damage to you unless she's attacking alone. Dash {R} (You may cast this spell for its dash cost. If you do, it gains haste, and it's returned from the battlefield to its owner's hand at the beginning of the next end step.)

card.name: Kuvira, the Great Uniter
card.text: When Kuvira enters, earthbend 7. That land becomes an artifact in addition to its other types. (To earthbend 7, target land you control becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land. Put seven +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies or is exiled, return it to the battlefield tapped.) Artifact creatures you control have vigilance and trample.

card.name: Godzilla
card.text: Trample Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, double Godzilla's power until end of turn. When Godzilla dies, if it had no stun counters on it, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with three stun counters on it.

card.name: Atomic Breath
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If excess damage is dealt this way, you get that many rad counters. (At the beginning of your precombat main phase, if you have any rad counters, mill that many cards. For each nonland card milled this way, you lose 1 life and a rad counter.)

card.name: King of the Monsters
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw cards equal to the greatest power among creatures you control. If you tap a permanent for mana, it produces twice that much mana instead.

card.name: King Ghidorah
card.text: Flying Ward—Pay 3 life. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.) If an opponent would lose life during your turn, they lose three times that much life instead.

card.name: Let Them Fight
card.text: Choose one or both— • Destroy all Human creatures. • Destroy all non-Human creatures.

card.name: Rodan, the Fire Demon
card.text: Emerge from artifact {4}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing an artifact and paying the emerge cost reduced by that artifact's mana value.) Flying When Rodan enters, it deals 4 damage to target opponent unless they have you draw three cards.

card.name: Kong
card.text: Trample When Kong enters, search your library for a land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Whenever Kong attacks, untap all lands you control.

card.name: Kong's Axe
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Equipped creature gets +X/+X and has trample, where X is the number of card types among cards exiled with Kong's Axe. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Mothra
card.text: Flying Whenever Mothra attacks, draw a card. When Mothra dies, create a 0/1 blue Egg creature token with "At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice this token. When you do, return target card named Mothra from your graveyard to the battlefield."

card.name: Mechagodzilla
card.text: Whenever Mechagodzilla attacks, it deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. Excess damage is dealt to that creature's controller instead. {10}: Monstrosity X, where X is the number of artifacts you control. (If this creature isn't monstrous, put X +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes monstrous.)

card.name: Overed Rail Cannon
card.text: Target creature gets -0/-210000 until end of turn.

card.name: C4-621 Raven
card.text: Flying, vigilance Modular 3 (This Vehicle enters with three +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies, you may put its +1/+1 counters on target artifact creature.) {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each artifact you control that's a creature and/or Vehicle. Crew 2

card.name: Ibis, C-Weapon
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Ibis deals combat damage to a player, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card. You may cast that card by discarding a card rather than paying its mana cost. Crew 1

card.name: Ayre, Echo of Coral
card.text: Flying Whenever Ayre attacks, create two tokens that are each a copy of target creature that crewed Ayre this turn, except the tokens aren't legendary and enter tapped and attacking. Sacrifice those tokens at the beginning of the next end step. Crew 3

card.name: Pulse Blade
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an artifact. Pulse Blade deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell's additional cost was paid, Pulse Blade deals X damage instead, where X is the sacrificed artifact's mana value.

card.name: ICE WORM
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink When this creature dies, search your library for up to two artifact cards with mana value 3 or less, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Distribute a deathtouch and lifelink counter among those artifacts.

card.name: Dinaurian's Edict
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature and loses X life, where X is the number of tapped creatures you control.

card.name: Gleaming Thunder Wyvern
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to any target. You may exert this creature as it attacks. When you do, the next instant or sorcery spell you cast this turn has storm. (An exerted creature won't untap during your next untap step.)

card.name: Hunter's Palico
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.") {T}: Add {G} equal to this creature's power.

card.name: Wave Dress Wyvern
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Each creature you control with toughness greater than its power assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Black Flame Wyvern
card.text: Menace At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player discards a card. Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of card types among cards in all graveyards.

card.name: Frozen Peak Wyvern
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Your opponent can't untap more than one creature during their untap steps.

card.name: White Wraith Wyvern
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you lose 3 life unless you sacrifice another creature. Renew — {1}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Each opponent loses life equal to that creature's power. Destroy that creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Earth-Piercing Bolt
card.text: Earth-Piercing Bolt deals 5 damage to target creature. Excess damage is dealt to you instead.

card.name: AAP07 Balteus
card.text: Flash Flying When this Vehicle enters, if it was cast, it deals 100 damage divided as you choose among any number of target attacking creatures. Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: The Legend of Wan
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create Raava, a legendary 4/4 colorless Spirit creature with flying. II — For each color among permanents you control, add one mana of that color. III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control. --- (Back): Avatar Wan

card.name: Avatar Wan
card.text: You may look at the top card of your library any time. During each of your turns, you may play a land and cast a spell of each color from the top of your library. (If a card is multiple colors, choose one as you play it.) --- (Front): The Legend of Wan

card.name: Amon, the Equalist
card.text: When Amon enters, you may waterbend {X}. When you do, choose target creature an opponent controls with mana value X. For as long as Amon remains on the battlefield, gain control of that creature and it loses all abilities. (While paying a waterbend cost, you can tap your artifacts and creatures to help. Each one pays for {1}.)

card.name: Zoh Shia, Errant Calamity
card.text: When you cast this spell, each opponent exiles half the cards in their hand, rounded down. Menace As long as an opponent has fewer than seven cards in hand, Zoh Shia has annihilator X, where X is the difference. (Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices X permanents.)

card.name: Bubble Fox Wyvern
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then you may cast a spell with mana value 2 or less from your hand without paying its mana cost. Waterbend {3}: This creature can't be blocked this turn. (While paying a waterbend cost, you can tap your artifacts and creatures to help. Each one pays for {1}.)

card.name: Gogmazios, Specter of War
card.text: Flying, menace When Gogmazios enters, you may pay {X}. When you do, Gogmazios deals X damage to each other creature. Pay 10 life: Add ten {R}. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Avis Unit Hunter
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") Noncreature, non-Equipment artifacts you control are Equipment in addition to their other types and have "Equipped creature gets +2/+0" and equip {1}.

card.name: Alma's Investigation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may collect evidence 6. (Exile cards with total mana value 6 or greater from your graveyard.) Search your library for a legendary card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. If evidence was collected, you gain life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: P'Li, Red Lotus Lieutenant
card.text: Firebending 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}. This mana lasts until end of combat.) Haste When P'Li enters, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Ming Hua, the Anarchist
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Waterbend {8}: Ming Hua's base power and toughness becomes 8/8. (This effect lasts indefinitely. While paying a waterbend cost, you can tap your artifacts and creatures to help. Each one pays for {1}.)

card.name: Ghazan, Prison Fugitive
card.text: When Ghazan enters, earthbend 4. (Target land you control becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land. Put four +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies or is exiled, return it to the battlefield tapped.) Whenever you attack, add X {R}, where X is the greatest power among attacking creatures. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Zaheer of the Red Lotus
card.text: Flash Flying When Zaheer enters, airbend up to one target spell or nonland permanent an opponent controls. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} rather than its mana cost.) Your opponents can't cast spells from anywhere other than their hand.

card.name: The Defect
card.text: The Defect enters with a charge counter on it. Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each charge counter on The Defect. Whenever The Defect becomes tapped, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Demon Form
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, put two strength counters on this enchantment. If a source you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals that much damage plus an amount of damage equal to the number of strength counters on this enchantment instead.

card.name: Eat Time
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) End the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities from the stack, including this card. Discard down to your maximum hand size. Damage wears off, and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.)

card.name: Watcher's Stances
card.text: Choose one or both — • Double all damage that would be dealt to target permanent or player this turn. • Prevent all damage that would be dealt to target permanent or player this turn.

card.name: Giant Head
card.text: This creature enters tapped with four stun counters on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) Whenever this creature attacks, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Crippling Cloud
card.text: Choose one or both— • Proliferate twice. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.) • All creatures get -4/-4 until end of turn.

card.name: Arlecchino, Blood Artist
card.text: Whenever a creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {1}, Sacrifice another nontoken creature: Create a token that's a copy of the sacrificed creature, except it has base power and toughness 1/1. Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Antonia's Mouser
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Nameless Puppet
card.text: At the beginning of each end step, if an artifact you controlled died this turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. {1}{B}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Romeo, King of Puppets
card.text: Multikicker {2}{W} (You may pay an additional {2}{W} any number of times as you cast this spell.) When Romeo enters, for each time he was kicked, create a 0/0 Construct artifact creature tokens with "This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." Sacrifice Romeo: Artifacts you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Lea Monad Florence
card.text: During your turn, Lea Monad Florence has first strike and trample. Whenever you cast your second or third spell each turn, double Lea Monad Florence's power until end of turn. {3}{W}{W}, Exile Lea Monad Florence from your graveyard: Create two tapped 1/1 white Human creature tokens.

card.name: Fated Confrontation
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. {2}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Add three mana in any combination of colors. You can't spend this mana to cast your first spell each turn.

card.name: Five Pebbles
card.text: Companion — Your starting deck contains all other cards you've drafted. (If this card is your chosen companion, you may put it into your hand from outside the game for {3} as a sorcery.) You may spend black mana as though it were mana of any color. Whenever you cast a white, blue, red, or green spell, you draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: King Vulture
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, nonartifact creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Shoreline Leviathan
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) Trample, indestructible This creature can only attack or block alone.

card.name: Slugcat
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may exile another target attacking creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under your control tapped and attacking. You may attach an Equipment you control to that creature.

card.name: Gold Pearl
card.text: You can't cast this spell during your first, second, or third turns of the game. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Industrial Complex
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {4}: This land becomes 0/0 Construct artifact creature with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." It's still a land. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Demon of Hatred
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever this creature attacks, add six {R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. Mayhem {3}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for {3}{R}{R} if you discarded it this turn. Timing rules still apply.)

card.name: Topple the King of Puppets
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest mana value among creatures they control. II — Add {B}{B}. III — Until the end of your next turn, whenever an opponent casts a spell, they lose 5 life unless they discard a card.

card.name: Gen Four Augmentation
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. If the sacrificed permanent was an artifact, target player draws two cards. If the sacrificed permanent was a creature, destroy target creature.

card.name: Contact With You
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may discard your hand. if you do, this spell costs {2} less to cast. Exile the top three cards of your library. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Coral Convergence
card.text: When you cast this spell, you may discard any number of cards. If you do, copy this spell that many times. Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: The Fires That Haunt Rubicon
card.text: Vivid — This spell costs {1} less to cast for each color among permanents you control. The Fires That Haunt Rubicon deals X damage to any target.

card.name: Pulse Shield
card.text: Choose one— • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. • Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1} for each artifact you control.

card.name: Anharion's Collar
card.text: {T}: Add {W}. When you spend this mana to cast a nonwhite spell, you lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Will and James
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink {T}: The next spell you cast this turn costs {X} less to cast, where X is the amount of life you gained this turn or the amount of life your opponents lost this turn, whichever is greater. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dark Rise
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Destroy all creatures. II — Add {B} for each creature card in your graveyard. III — Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with an indestructible counter on it.

card.name: ALLMIND and Iguazu
card.text: Exile an artifact or creature card from your graveyard: ALLMIND and Iguazu become an artifact creature until end of turn. Activate only once each turn and only as a sorcery. ALLMIND and Iguazu has all activated and triggered abilities of artifact and creature cards exiled with it.

card.name: Pull Into Service
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for an artifact card, exile it, then shuffle. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary. II, III — Create a token that's a copy of a card exiled with this Saga, except it isn't legendary. ​

card.name: IB-C03 Walter
card.text: IB-C03 "Walter" enters under the control of an opponent of your choice. IB-C03 "Walter" can't be sacrificed. During your turn, IB-C03 "Walter" is an artifact creature and attacks each combat if able. Whenever IB-C03 "Walter" attacks, its owner draws two cards.

card.name: V.IV Rusty
card.text: Flying Valiant — Whenever V.IV Rusty becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it becomes an artifact creature. If it's already an artifact creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it instead. Crew 2

card.name: O'Rin of the Waters
card.text: Sneak {U} (You may cast this spell for {U} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. She enters tapped and attacking.) O'Rin of the Waters's power is equal to the number of Islands you control. Whenever O'Rin of the Waters deals 4 or more damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: P-Organ
card.text: At the beginning of your second main phase, untap this artifact. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Monad's Lamp
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. When you spend this mana to cast a nongreen spell, you lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: P, Puppet of Gepetto
card.text: Backup 1 (When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. If that's another creature, it gains the following abilities until end of turn.) This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.

card.name: Bell Collar
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. You can't spend this mana to cast Human spells.

card.name: Allied Mastercomputer
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top two cards of your library. Put one into your hand and the other into your graveyard. Whenever you attack, return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It has no abilities and enters tapped and attacking. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Levi, One with Vesta
card.text: Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token. Whenever Levi attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each Plant you control.

card.name: Vesta Wilderness
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) As Vesta Wilderness enters, you may behold two artifacts. If you don't, Vesta Wilderness enters tapped. (To behold an artifact, choose an artifact you control or reveal an artifact card from your hand.)

card.name: Omega Planetes
card.text: Flying Creatures your opponents control can be the targets of spells and abilities as though they didn't have hexproof. Ward abilities of those creatures don't trigger. Boast — {X}: Omega Planetes deals X damage to any target. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Tapu Koko
card.text: Flying, haste Red spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a red spell, Tapu Koko deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Tapu Lele
card.text: Flying, lifelink White spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a white spell, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Tapu Bulu
card.text: Flying, trample Green spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a green spell, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Tapu Fini
Celesteela, the Launch
card.text: Flying Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each artifact you control. Warp {3}{U}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Nihilego, the Symbiont
card.text: Flying When Nihilego enters, choose target nonland card in your graveyard. You may cast that card if it's an instant or sorcery card or if it was put there from anywhere this turn. Warp {1}{U} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Ultra Wormhole
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Exert this land: Add two mana of any one color. You can't spend this mana to cast spells from your hand. (An exerted permanent won't untap during your next untap step.)

card.name: Blacephalon, the Burst
card.text: Trample, haste At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice Blacephalon unless it entered this turn. Warp {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Buzzwole, the Swollen
card.text: Trample Whenever you attack, double target attacking creature's power and toughness until end of turn. Warp {1}{G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Xurkitree, the Glowing
card.text: {G}, Sacrifice another artifact: Search your library for a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed artifact's mana value, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Activate only each turn and only as a sorcery. Warp {G} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Ultra Emergence
card.text: Until end of turn, nonland permanent cards in your hand have warp {3}. (You may cast a card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile that permanent at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.) Draw a card.

card.name: Kartana, the Drawn Sword
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a spell, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card. If you discarded a land card this way, add {R}. Warp {R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Stakataka, the Rampart
card.text: Stakataka enters with four +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever this creature or another creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it had counters on it, you may put those counters on target creature. Warp {3} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Guzzlord, the Junkivore
card.text: When Guzzlord enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, draw two cards. Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Warp {3}{B} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Pheromosa, the Lissome
card.text: Haste When Pheromosa enters, gain control of up to one target creature an opponent controls until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Warp {2}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Sea Creeper Pokémon
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, mill three cards. You may put a land card from among them into your hand. {T}: The next spell you cast this turn has delve. Activate only as a sorcery. (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting that spell pays for {1}.)

card.name: Meteor Pokémon
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, choose any number. You lose 2 life for each mode chosen beyond the first. • Create a Treasure token. • Draw a card. • Each opponent loses 2 life.

card.name: Hard Scale Pokémon
card.text: Sneak {2}{R} (You may cast this spell for {2}{R} if you also return an unblocked attacker you control to hand during the declare blockers step. It enters tapped and attacking.) Haste If a creature you control that entered this turn would deal damage, it deals twice that much damage instead.

card.name: Trainer Bond
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to one Human creature card and up to one non-Human creature card each with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Lusamine, Motherbeast
card.text: Flying When Lusamine enters, gain control of target creature an opponent controls for as long as you control Lusamine. Warp {1}{UB} (You may cast this card from your hand for its warp cost. Exile this creature at the beginning of the next end step, then you may cast it from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: Dyson Sphere Array
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) When this artifact enters, draw three cards. During your turn, you may cast spells from your hand without paying their mana costs. If you would draw a card while your library has no cards in it, you win the game instead.

card.name: Uploaded Intelligence
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Draw a card for each artifact you control.

card.name: Flame Tail Wyvern
card.text: If a source you control would deal an amount of noncombat damage less than this creature's power to an opponent, that source deals damage equal to this creature's power instead. {R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Cladding Frog Wyvern
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may put a land card exiled with it onto the battlefield under your control. {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Pioneer Beast Wyvern
card.text: Enrage — Whenever this creature is dealt damage, create a token that's a copy of it, except it has base power and toughness 3/3.

card.name: Sand Sea Wyvern
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Trample This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Swamp Spouting Wyvern
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each Swamp you control. When this creature dies, each opponent loses life equal to its power.

card.name: Thorny Flower Spider
card.text: Reach Whenever another creature enters, this creature deals 1 damage to that creature's controller.

card.name: Rove, the Well-Spoken
card.text: Rove enters with two +1/+1 counters on him. Once during each of your turns, you may cast an artifact spell from your graveyard by removing a +1/+1 counter from Rove in addition to that spell's other costs.

card.name: Gore Magala, Dark Eclipse
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Once during each of your turns, rather than pay the mana cost for a black spell you cast, you may exile any number of black cards with X or more black mana symbols among their mana costs from your graveyard, where X is that spell's mana value.

card.name: Blade Phantom
card.text: Whenever a source you control deals noncombat damage to a player, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand. Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Wraith Form
card.text: Vanishing 2 (This permanent enters with two time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) If you would lose life or pay life while your library has one or more cards in it, you may instead exile that many cards from the top of your library.

card.name: Echo Form
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Deva Form
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a deva counter on this enchantment, then add {G} for each deva counter on this enchantment. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Guardian Construct
card.text: Haste Whenever you cast a colorless spell, add {R} and exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Piercing Assassin Wyvern
card.text: Deathtouch During your turn, this creature has first strike strike. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, they lose half their life, rounded up. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.

card.name: Cannon Pokémon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying. When you do, this creature deals X damage to up to one target creature, where X is the number of creatures with flying you control.

card.name: Larva Pokémon
card.text: Replicate {2} (When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost.) {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Bee Fly Pokémon
card.text: Flying Other creatures you control with flying get +1/+0.

card.name: Small Fry Pokémon
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {1}{U}, Exile any number of cards from your graveyard with four or more card types among them: Adapt 4. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put four +1/+1 counters on it.)

card.name: Brutal Star Pokémon
card.text: Ward {1} Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Bloom Sickle Pokémon
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. If you exiled a land card from your graveyard this way, create a tapped token that's copy of it.

card.name: Toxic Lizard Pokémon
card.text: Whenever a source you control deals noncombat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Battalion — Whenever this creature and at least two other creatures attack, this creature deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Illuminating Pokémon
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. Whenever you gain life for the second time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Strong Arm Pokémon
card.text: Creatures you control with no abilities get +1/+1.

card.name: Sea Cucumber Pokémon
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 4 damage to each creature and each player it dealt damage to this turn. {3}{R}: Sacrifice this creature.

card.name: Type: Null, the Synthetic
card.text: Mayhem {X} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for {X} if you discarded it this turn. Timing rules still apply.) Vigilance, trample Converge — Type: Null enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each color of mana spent to cast it.

card.name: Disguise Pokémon
card.text: This creature enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) {1}: This creature becomes a copy of another target creature, except it still has this ability.

card.name: Cosmog, the Nebula
card.text: Flying, vigilance {T}: Add {U} for each spell you've cast this turn. You can't spend this mana to cast creature spells.

card.name: Rotom, Living Plasma
card.text: Flying Equipped creature has flying and "Whenever this creature attacks, double its power until end of turn." Reconfigure {4} ({4}: Attach to target creature you control; or unattach from a creature. Reconfigure only as a sorcery. While attached, this isn't a creature.)

card.name: The Regent
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 colorless Minion creature token. If that spell is colorless, create two of those tokens instead. {1}, Sacrifice two Minions: Draw a card. {1}, Sacrifice four Minions: Copy target noncreature spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Void Form
card.text: When this enchantment enters, end the turn. (Exile all spells and abilities from the stack. The player whose turn it is discards down to their maximum hand size. Damage wears off, and "this turn" and "until end of turn" effects end.) You may pay {0} rather than pay the mana costs for the first and second spells you cast during each of your turns.

card.name: Know Thy Place
card.text: Target creature has base power and toughness 1/1 until end of turn. Cycling {B} ({B}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: Hate. Hate.
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may pay any amount of life. When you do, target creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the amount of life paid. II — You draw a card and lose 1 life. III — If your life total is less than your starting life total, draw cards equal to the difference.

card.name: Kosmo, Cosmic Companion
card.text: Flash Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may exile Kosmo. When you do, exile up to one other target nonland permanent you control. Return both to the battlefield under your control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Rainbow Canyon
card.text: Imprint — When this land enters, you may exile a multicolored card from your hand. {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. If a card is exiled with this land, add three mana in any combination of the exiled card's colors instead.

card.name: Guhnash, World Eater
card.text: Flying, trample When Guhnash enters, each opponent chooses six permanents they control, then sacrifices the rest. Whenever another permanent leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Guhnash.

card.name: Reanimate
card.text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Genichiro Ashina // Lightning Bolt
card.text:
When Genichiro Ashina dies, return him to the battlefield with a finality counter on him. He becomes prepared. (While he's prepared, you may cast a copy of his spell. Doing so unprepares him.)
---
Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Hirata Estate
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) As Hirata Estate enters, you may behold two artifacts. If you don't, Hirata Estate enters tapped. (To behold an artifact, choose an artifact you control or reveal an artifact card from your hand.)

card.name: Explore
card.text: You may play an additional land this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Reaper Leviathan
card.text: If a creature an opponent controls would die, instead exile it and put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. {1}{G}, Discard this card: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you don't control would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Ghost Leviathan
card.text: When you cast this spell, each opponent exiles a permanent they control that's one or more colors. Each spell that's one or more colors costs {1} more to cast for each of its colors.

card.name: Modular Technology
card.text: Whenever an artifact or creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put those counters on this enchantment. At the beginning of combat on your turn, if this enchantment has counters on it, you may move any number of counters from this enchantment onto target creature or enchantment.
